reasoning: While the fidelity composite score is high (0.8922), the document's nature as a tutorial makes the loss of nearly all instructional screenshots and diagrams a significant concern. Additionally, the omission of critical contact information (website and email) and a shingling recall below 0.85 suggest content loss that warrants human judgment, especially given the high cost of false negatives in accessibility conversions.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: In the 'Get in touch' section on page 34, the source PDF lists four lines of text: the company name, website, phone number, and email address. The converted output includes the company name and phone number but omits the website URL ('Web: www.ablr360.com') and the email address ('Email: kim.casey@ablr360.com'). This represents a loss of roughly 50% of the textual information in this contact section.

concerns.analysis: The HTML output is missing nearly all meaningful images from the source PDF, including instructional screenshots of software interfaces, diagrams of keyboards showing shortcuts, and the QR code on the final page. While some image content has been represented as text or tables, the visual context of the screenshots—which is critical for a tutorial document—is absent. concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains instructional screenshots and diagrams on almost every page, including shortcuts on page 15 and a QR code on page 34.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output shows headings like 'Creating a Keyboard Shortcut' and 'Thank You!' but the corresponding images (screenshots and QR code) are missing.
concerns.location: Throughout the document, specifically in sections 'Creating a Keyboard Shortcut' and 'Thank You!'

action_items: Evaluate if the missing screenshots and QR code significantly degrade the tutorial's utility.
Restore missing contact information in the 'Get in touch' section on page 34.
